name: Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield Medicaid
parentPlan: Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield Medicaid
description: Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield Medicaid is one of Kentucky's managed care organizations, covering Medicaid members across the state with a broad behavioral health and substance use disorder (SUD) benefit. Anthem's Kentucky Medicaid plan covers the full ASAM continuum for SUD treatment, including detox, residential, PHP, IOP, outpatient, and medication-assisted treatment.
coverageHighlights: Medical withdrawal management (detox) at ASAM levels 3.7 and 4
Standard outpatient SUD counseling with no arbitrary visit limits
Medication-Assisted Treatment — including Suboxone, methadone, and Vivitrol
Integrated treatment for co-occurring mental health conditions (dual diagnosis)
Coordinated care for pregnant members with SUD via Kentucky's expanded maternal benefit
priorAuthNotes: Residential SUD admissions and some MAT induction scenarios typically require prior authorization or concurrent review. Anthem generally applies ASAM criteria for medical-necessity determinations.
memberBenefitsNote: Anthem Medicaid members have access to 24/7 nurse line support, case management for high-risk SUD cases, and non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) to treatment appointments.
